about.meta.description: SolForge is a static web tools site that provides developer tools, text and file processing, and life calculators in your browser. We provide information on the purpose of the service, local processing principles, and advertising/affiliate operation methods.
about.meta.title: About - SolForge
about.text.0033: SolForge is a static web tools site built to handle small tasks that developers and everyday users repeat often. It provides development, text, file, image, and everyday calculation tools directly in the browser instead of requiring installed programs.
about.text.0035: The goal is to provide frequently repeated work such as SQL and execution-plan analysis, text cleanup, data conversion, local file processing, and everyday calculations in one consistent interface.
about.text.0037: SolForge is a static site consisting of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Currently, the feature runs solely in the user's browser, without a server API or database, and is deployed against static hosting environments such as Cloudflare Pages or Workers Assets.
about.text.0039: SolForge may use Google AdSense advertising and Coupang Partners banners to operate its free tools. Advertisements and affiliate links are placed in a separate location from the content, and the Coupang Partners link is displayed so that users can see that a certain amount of commission is received for purchases made through the link.
about.text.0041: EXPLAIN Visual's cost values ​​are estimates based on rows, filtered, access type, and Extra information when MySQL does not provide values ​​directly in the copy results. Actual operational query tuning should be judged in conjunction with MySQL server statistics, index status, data distribution, and EXPLAIN ANALYZE results.
about.text.0049: SolForge brings developer tools, text utilities, file and media helpers, device diagnostics, performance checks, date, age, solar/lunar, and school schedule calculators, plus stock and crypto reference tools into one place. Each tool is designed for immediate use without installation or account registration.
about.text.0050: The tool directory can be browsed by name, category, and keyword, and individual tool pages are being expanded with input examples and result guidance where possible. The goal is to operate a static toolbox that helps users finish real tasks, not just a collection of links.
about.text.0052: Features that handle SQL, JSON, text, dates, images, and local files are processed in the browser whenever possible. SolForge does not store pasted queries or selected files on its own servers, and tools that require public APIs explain when external requests may occur.
about.text.0054: When new features are added, Korean and English pages are updated together, and the same workflows are checked on mobile and desktop. Tool results are provided as reference material to support user judgment, and important decisions involving legal, financial, medical, security, or production database work should also be checked against official documentation and expert review.
about.text.0055: Error reports, feature suggestions, rights infringement reports, and privacy-related requests can be submitted through the contact page. Feedback is prioritized for improving tool documentation, accessibility, unnecessary ad placement reduction, and mobile usability.
calculators.age.meta.description: This is a static age calculator that calculates your full age, Korean-style counting age, and adult status by entering your date of birth and standard date.
calculators.age.meta.title: age calculator - SolForge
calculators.age.text.0033: Age is calculated based on date of birth along with Korean age.
calculators.all.meta.description: A free everyday calculator collection for age, zodiac signs, dates, D-Day, anniversaries, solar/lunar calendar conversion, holidays, no-hand days, school admission and graduation, and fun name generation.
calculators.all.meta.title: Life Calculator Collection - SolForge
calculators.all.text.0008: The entered date and value are not transmitted or stored on the server.
calculators.all.text.0020: Everyday calculators gathered in one place.
calculators.all.text.0021: Everything from age and zodiac sign to dates, solar calendar, holidays, and school schedules are calculated within the browser. You can select categories and functions directly from the left menu.
calculators.all.text.0025: This post is part of Coupang Partners' activities, and a certain amount of commission is received accordingly.
calculators.all.text.0029: Calculate full age, counting age, annual age, and majority based on date of birth and standard date.
calculators.all.text.0033: Age table and traditional age terms by year
calculators.all.text.0034: Check the table for your age by year of birth in the base year, your zodiac sign and traditional age terms.
calculators.all.text.0043: Zodiac, same-zodiac years, compatibility, and Samjae
calculators.all.text.0044: Check at once the zodiac sign of your birth year, the year of your zodiac sign, the traditional compatibility of the two zodiac signs, and whether or not you are lucky.
calculators.all.text.0045: Zodiac and same-zodiac years by birth year
calculators.all.text.0055: Check the day of the week, number of days of the year, remaining days, whether it is a leap year, and the lunar date.
calculators.all.text.0059: Calculate the period between two dates and D-Day relative to today.
calculators.all.text.0062: Include both start and end dates
calculators.all.text.0064: Date range list and weekday count
calculators.all.text.0065: Counts the number of weekdays and weekends in a selected period and creates a list of days by date.
calculators.all.text.0068: Exclude Saturdays and Sundays from the list
calculators.all.text.0071: Add or subtract the desired year, month, week, and day from the base date.
calculators.all.text.0078: It calculates the start date as the 1st day and shows the 100th day, 200th day, first birthday, and desired anniversary.
calculators.all.text.0083: Convert to a local library that follows the Korea Astronomy and Space Science Institute standard data. The support range is from 1000-02-13 to 2050-12-31.
calculators.all.text.0092: Solar dates for a lunar anniversary by year
calculators.all.text.0093: Calculate which solar calendar date falls on the same lunar month and day in multiple years.
calculators.all.text.0101: Calculate fixed holidays, Lunar New Year, Buddha's Birthday, and Chuseok. Election days and temporary government holidays are not included.
calculators.all.text.0106: Traditionally, months are marked with days ending in 9 or 0 in the lunar calendar.
calculators.all.text.0110: School admission and graduation years with student ages
calculators.all.text.0111: Based on the year of birth, it calculates the general elementary, middle, and high school entrance and graduation years and shows the year of birth by grade.
calculators.all.text.0113: Base year for student age table
calculators.all.text.0119: Create a fun name by combining your date of birth. It is not representative of any actual culture or naming tradition.
calculators.all.text.0123: How to use these calculation results
calculators.all.text.0124: The results on this page are for everyday reference only. The timing of school admission, determination of majority, and public holidays and substitute holidays may vary depending on laws, administrative decisions, and personal circumstances, so please check the latest guidance from relevant organizations for important schedules.
calculators.all.text.0125: © 2026 SolForge. Static tools in your browser.
calculators.anniversary.meta.description: This is a static calculator that calculates anniversary dates such as 100th, 200th, and project milestones by entering the start date and number of days.
calculators.anniversary.meta.title: anniversary calculator - SolForge
calculators.anniversary.text.0033: Considering the start date as the 1st, calculate the date of the desired number of days.
calculators.date.meta.description: A static SolForge date calculator for date differences, D-Day, and adding or subtracting dates in one place.
calculators.date.meta.title: date calculator - SolForge
calculators.date.text.0033: date difference, D-Day, date add subtract without a server calculate.
calculators.school.meta.description: This is a static calculator that calculates the expected year of entry and graduation from elementary school, middle school, and high school based on year of birth.
calculators.school.meta.title: admission·graduation calculator - SolForge
calculators.school.text.0033: Calculate typical elementary, middle, and high school entrance and graduation times based on your year of birth.
calculators.school.text.0035: Please use this for reference as actual results may differ depending on region, early admission, deferment, and changes in school system.
contact.meta.description: This is SolForge inquiry information. We provide information on service errors, personal information, advertising/affiliate, rights infringement, and how to submit feature suggestions.
contact.meta.title: Contact - SolForge
contact.text.0033: SolForge is a static web tool that does not operate a member account or customer support system. Service errors, personal information, advertising/affiliate, rights infringement, and feature suggestions can be submitted by following the instructions below.
contact.text.0035: The official inquiry channel is email. Your email address will not be displayed directly on the page to reduce spam collection, and will only open in your email app when you press the button below. Please do not include personal information, API tokens, internal queries, or trade secrets that are difficult to disclose in your inquiry.
contact.text.0038: You can report tool errors, suggest feature improvements, inquire about advertising/affiliate display, requests regarding privacy policy, report copyright or rights infringement, and submit security concerns.
contact.text.0040: Inquiries are checked to the extent possible, and due to the nature of the free static service, we do not guarantee an individual response to all inquiries. Inquiries regarding security, personal information, and rights violations will be checked first.
contact.text.0042: SolForge may display Google AdSense ads and Coupang Partners banners. Advertising creatives, personalized advertising, and cookie settings are managed according to each advertising provider's policies and user settings.
features.meta.description: An overview of how SolForge handles developer, text, file, image, voice, date, age, solar/lunar calendar, and everyday calculation tools.
features.meta.title: Features - SolForge
features.text.0033: SolForge is a set of static web tools that help you speed up development tasks, text and file processing, image and audio functions, and everyday calculations. Input values ​​and local files are processed within the browser without going through a separate upload server.
features.text.0035: Highlight reserved words, functions, strings, numbers, variables, and table names, and organize SELECT lists, WHERE conditions, JOIN conditions, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, CTEs, and subqueries line by line. You can take the organized results right away using the copy button.
features.text.0037: Analyze tab-delimited EXPLAIN results, ASCII tables copied from mysqlsh or CLI, and execution plans in JSON format. Table access order, join flow, whether or not to use indexes, and estimated costs based on rows and filtered are displayed in cards and tables.
features.text.0038: Dark mode and dedicated tool pages
features.text.0039: Dark mode is supported for users who view code and execution plans for a long time. Each function operates independently on a separate URL, making it easy to bookmark, share, and expand functions in the future.
features.text.0041: It provides character count, text organization, Korean-English typing, personal information masking, number/Korean amount, JSON, Base64 text/file conversion, URL, Timestamp, UUID, chmod, and password creation functions.
features.text.0044: It supports special characters, code tables, colors, text comparison, subtitle conversion, HTML preview, file checksum, image compression, Data URL, TTS·STT, EML, and keyboard events.
features.text.0047: It provides age, date of birth, maturity, date of birth, next birthday, age table by year, zodiac sign, zodiac sign compatibility, zodiac sign, date information and D-Day, weekday and weekend date list, date addition and subtraction, anniversary and baby 100-day calculation.
features.text.0050: It provides time/working time calculation, code sorting/compression, Hash·HMAC·PBKDF2·AES-GCM, QR·Code 39, ASCII art, GIF creation/frame extraction, Magic Eye, number baseball, and barcode scanning/flashlight for supported devices.
features.text.0053: Calculate solar and lunar calendar interchanges based on the Korean lunar calendar, solar calendar dates by year for lunar anniversaries, fixed and lunar holidays, and handless days within the browser.
features.text.0055: It shows the expected year of elementary, middle, and high school entrance and graduation according to the year of birth and a student age table by grade, and also provides recreational naming using a combination of date of birth.
features.text.0057: The site includes an introductory document, function description, privacy policy, and ad reservation area considering AdSense and Coupang Partners banner operation. Advertising cookies, methods for managing personalized advertising, and affiliate commission notices can be found in our privacy policy.

privacy.meta.description: This is SolForge’s privacy policy. Information on local input data, email inquiries, advertising cookies, Coupang Partners, external APIs, storage and user rights.
privacy.meta.title: Privacy Policy - SolForge
privacy.text.0033: SolForge is a static web tool that does not provide registration, login, payment, or comments. Text, dates, queries, and local files that users enter or select in the tools are generally processed in the browser and are not stored on SolForge's own servers. However, the information below may be processed for site operation, inquiry responses, advertising, and affiliate banner display.
privacy.text.0035: Tool input: Values entered into each tool, including SQL, JSON, text, dates, numbers, and local files, are processed in browser memory. SolForge does not separately retain them when the page is refreshed or the tab is closed.
privacy.text.0036: Access Information: Hosting infrastructures, such as Cloudflare, may process logs such as IP addresses, request URLs, browser information, access times, and approximate location information for security, caching, and failure response purposes.
privacy.text.0037: Inquiry Information: When sending an email inquiry, the sending email address, inquiry content, attachments, and sending/receiving times may be processed by the email provider and SolForge during the inquiry response process.
privacy.text.0039: SolForge processes your information to the extent necessary to provide the functionality of our tools, check for errors, ensure security and prevent abuse, respond to inquiries, improve our services, operate advertising and partnerships, and fulfill our legal obligations.
privacy.text.0041: Some functions, such as voice recognition, device diagnosis, camera, microphone, clipboard, and file selection, may request browser permission. Permission is requested when you run the function directly and can be revoked at any time in your browser settings. Processing practices by browser and operating system providers are subject to each provider's policies.
privacy.text.0043: SolForge may display Google AdSense advertisements. Third-party advertisers, including Google, may use cookies to serve ads based on your visit to SolForge or other websites. Advertising cookies allow Google to serve you personalized ads based on information about your visits to SolForge and other sites on the Internet.
privacy.text.0044: Users can manage or opt out of personalized ads in
privacy.text.0046: , and can learn more about how Google processes personal information in the
privacy.text.0048: . You may also limit cookie storage in your browser settings, but some ads or site features may behave differently as a result.
privacy.text.0050: SolForge may contain Coupang Partners banners or affiliate links. If you purchase a product through the link, SolForge receives a certain amount of commission as part of Coupang Partners activities. Affiliate banners and links are displayed close to advertisements or affiliate information so that users can see that they are advertisements.
privacy.text.0051: When operating the Coupang Partners shortcut icon or affiliate link, we do not send advertising messages through messengers or SNS without prior consent of the recipient.
privacy.text.0053: Some tools may use public APIs or browser built-in features, such as npm Registry, jsDelivr, or Nager.Date. When you run this function, the user's requested information may be transmitted to an external service, and the policies and terms of use of each service apply.
privacy.text.0055: Tool inputs and local files are not stored on SolForge's own servers. Email inquiries may be stored for as long as necessary to process inquiries and respond to disputes, and will be deleted when no longer needed. Logs and cookies processed by hosting, advertising, and email providers follow the storage standards of each provider.
privacy.text.0057: Users can delete or block cookies and revoke browser permissions through their browser settings. Requests for viewing, correction, or deletion related to email inquiries
privacy.text.0059: You can request it by following the instructions.
privacy.text.0061: We recommend that you do not paste queries containing operational DB passwords, API tokens, customer personal information, trade secrets, or internal network addresses in public or shared environments. SolForge provides an easy-to-use tool, but users are responsible for determining the security of their input.
privacy.text.0063: We will update this document if our operations change, such as adding features, applying advertising, or opening inquiry channels. Last modified on June 29, 2026.
privacy.text.0070: Cookie blocking and deletion can be managed in the settings menu of your browser. For example, Chrome provides cookie and site data controls under Privacy and security, and Safari, Edge, and Firefox provide similar controls in their privacy or tracking-prevention settings.
privacy.text.0072: SolForge does not operate a member database and does not store tool inputs on its own servers to sell or provide them to third parties. However, hosting and security infrastructure such as Cloudflare, ad providers such as Google AdSense, email providers, and public API providers may process access information or request information according to their own policies to the extent necessary to provide the site.
privacy.text.0073: These external providers may operate as direct processors for SolForge or as independent third-party services, and each service's privacy policy and retention standards may also apply.
privacy.text.0075: SolForge reduces the scope of personal information processing by maintaining a static deployment structure, using HTTPS, relying on hosting infrastructure security features, limiting inquiry information processing, and avoiding unnecessary server-side storage. When site code and documents change, the operator checks that inputs are not unintentionally transmitted externally.
privacy.text.0077: SolForge does not provide account registration, profiles, payments, or comments for children under 14 and does not intentionally collect children's personal information. Guardians should help children avoid entering personal information, sensitive school or household information, or materials that require guardian consent into the tools.
privacy.text.0079: Privacy-related inquiries can be submitted through the contact page. If additional counseling or reporting is needed, users may refer to public resources such as the Personal Information Protection Commission privacy portal or the Korea Internet & Security Agency privacy infringement report center.
terms.meta.description: These are SolForge Terms of Use. We inform you of the scope of services, user obligations, local processing principles, advertising and affiliation, limitation of liability, intellectual property rights and how to contact us.
terms.meta.title: Terms - SolForge
terms.text.0033: These Terms and Conditions guide you through the terms of use and scope of responsibility for the static web tool services provided by SolForge. By using SolForge, you agree to these Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
terms.text.0035: The purpose of these Terms and Conditions is to establish the terms of use of the SolForge website and each tool page, rights and obligations between users and operators, limitations of liability and operating standards.
terms.text.0037: SolForge provides browser-based tools for SQL formatting, execution-plan checks, text processing, file and media helpers, date and everyday calculations, and more. It does not provide account registration, login, payment, comments, or community features.
terms.text.0038: Most functions run in JavaScript in the user's browser. Some tools may use public APIs or browser-provided features, and results may vary depending on the availability of those external services.
terms.text.0039: Article 3 Effect and change of terms and conditions
terms.text.0040: These Terms and Conditions are effective upon posting on the Site. The operator may change the terms and conditions according to laws, service structure, advertising/affiliate policies, or security needs, and important changes will be notified by updating the date of last modification in the documents on the site.
terms.text.0042: Users must comply with relevant laws and these Terms and Conditions, and must not interfere with the normal operation of the service or infringe the rights of other users or third parties.
terms.text.0043: Prohibited actions include making excessive automated requests, exploiting security vulnerabilities, processing illegal or harmful content, unauthorized processing of personal information or trade secrets of others, unauthorized copying of service screens, text, or code, and bypassing or manipulating advertising and affiliate areas.
terms.text.0045: The user has the rights to the text, date, query, file and the results entered by the user. SolForge does not store your inputs on its own servers or associate them with separate user accounts.
terms.text.0046: However, browsers, extensions, operating systems, networks, external APIs, advertising providers and affiliated platforms may process separate information according to their own policies. We recommend that you do not enter sensitive information in public or public environments.
terms.text.0047: Article 6 Accuracy and Verification of Results
terms.text.0048: SolForge's calculations, conversions, formatting, performance measurements, and life information such as compatibility, samjae, and handless days are reference materials for your convenience. For important decisions such as legal, tax, financial, medical, security, database operation, and admission/administrative decisions, official documents and expert reviews must be checked.
terms.text.0049: MySQL execution plan, cost estimation, browser device diagnosis, and date/lunar calendar calculation results may vary depending on input values, browser environment, external libraries, and data standards.
terms.text.0051: SolForge may display Google AdSense advertisements, Coupang Partners banners and affiliate links to operate its free services. Advertising and affiliate areas are placed separately from the content, and it is indicated that SolForge may receive a certain amount of commission for purchases made through Coupang Partners links.
terms.text.0052: Advertisers and affiliated platforms may process cookies, advertising identifiers and access information. For further details, please follow our privacy policy.
terms.text.0054: The Operator may change or suspend some or all of the Services for functional improvements, security measures, hosting failures, external API failures, excessive traffic, legal requests, or operational needs.
terms.text.0056: The rights to SolForge's screen composition, self-written text, code, logo, design and compilation belong to the operator. Open source or external libraries are subject to their respective licenses.
terms.text.0057: Users may use the results provided by SolForge for personal or business reference purposes, but may not copy the site itself or redistribute it in a way that is confusing with the service.
terms.text.0059: SolForge provides the free static tools AS-IS and does not warrant their fitness for any particular purpose, their freedom from error, their continued availability, or the completeness or accuracy of their results. Users are responsible for verifying the service results themselves.
terms.text.0060: The operator limits liability to the extent permitted by law for damages caused by user input, external service failure, advertising/affiliate platform, browser environment, network problems, or force majeure.
terms.text.0062: For service-related inquiries, rights infringement reports, and personal information-related requests,
terms.text.0064: You can apply by following the instructions. The laws of the Republic of Korea apply to disputes regarding these Terms and Conditions and use of the Service.
terms.text.0068: Coverage: Entire SolForge website and sub-tool pages
terms.text.0075: Article 12 External Links and Third-Party Services
terms.text.0076: For convenience, SolForge may provide public APIs, CDNs, ad networks, affiliate platforms, or links to external websites. The content, accuracy, availability, privacy practices, and transaction terms of external services are governed by the policies and terms of each provider.
terms.text.0077: When users purchase products or use external services through external links, SolForge is not a party to that transaction. If ads or affiliate links are present, SolForge displays economic-interest disclosures according to applicable laws and platform policies.
terms.text.0078: Article 13 Use by Minors and Children
terms.text.0079: SolForge is a public static tool for general users and does not intentionally collect personal information from children under 14 or operate member services for them. We recommend that guardians help minors avoid entering sensitive personal information, payment information, or materials that require guardian consent.

tools.device-diagnostics.meta.title: Audio, Camera, and Sensor Diagnostics - SolForge
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0008: The camera and microphone are only requested when the user presses the start button.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0020: Check your audio and input devices in your browser.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0021: Check speakers, headphones, microphone, webcam, gamepad, touch, motion sensor, and vibration API locally without a server.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0068: There are no matching diagnostic tools.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0071: Play a short test tone through the left, right, and center channels.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0077: Check the bass response of your speakers or headphones with a low frequency tone.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0083: Determine the output range with a fixed tone or 100Hz to 10kHz sweep.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0089: Check that the left and right channels are not reversed.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0095: Move the stereo pan left and right to check the sense of space.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0099: Measures microphone input level in real time. This is relative to browser input, not absolute dB SPL.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0104: If you allow browser permission, it will show a camera preview.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0110: Connect the controller and press any button to see the status.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0114: Records touch or pointer input locations on the canvas.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0118: Read DeviceMotion values from supported browsers.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0122: Displays alpha, beta, and gamma direction values in supported browsers.
tools.device-diagnostics.text.0126: Run the Vibration API pattern on a supported device.
tools.display-diagnostics.meta.descripti: Static monitor tests for dead pixels, backlight bleed, black and white levels, brightness, contrast, gamma, color range, uniformity, ghosting, frame skipping, FPS, and refresh rate.
tools.display-diagnostics.meta.title: Monitor and Display Diagnostics - SolForge
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0008: Use each panel's fullscreen button to inspect patterns at a larger size.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0020: Check your monitor with practical test patterns.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0021: Use canvas patterns and browser timers to inspect solid colors, contrast, gamma, color range, uniformity, motion, and frame pacing.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0069: No matching screen diagnostic tools found.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0072: Switch between solid color patterns to check for stuck pixels, dead pixels, and dot-shaped defects.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0076: Check for light leakage on a black screen in a dark room.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0080: Check whether nearby dark steps remain distinguishable.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0084: Check whether bright steps are still separated instead of clipping together.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0092: Show high-contrast checkerboard and step patterns.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0096: Compare stripe patterns against mid-gray to judge gamma response.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0100: Check whether RGB and HSV ramps transition smoothly.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0104: Check brightness and color temperature differences across areas with the same target brightness.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0108: Inspect trailing artifacts behind fast-moving blocks.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0112: Check whether dots appear at even intervals without skipped frames.
tools.display-diagnostics.text.0116: Estimate refresh rate from requestAnimationFrame intervals and show browser resolution details.
tools.file-media-toolbox.meta.descriptio: Tools for special characters, code tables, colors, text comparison, subtitle conversion, HTML preview, file checksum, image compression, TTS, STT, EML and keyboard event.
tools.file-media-toolbox.meta.title: File, Document, and Media Tools - SolForge
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0008: The selected file will be read in your current browser without being uploaded.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0020: Files and browser functions are also handled locally.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0021: Documents and images are converted without uploading them to the server, and voice and keyboard functions are implemented within the range of browser support.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0069: Collection of special characters and emojis
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0070: Search for a character and click on it to copy it to the clipboard.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0075: Search for references to printable ASCII characters and HTML numeric characters.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0085: Once you pick a color, it calculates HEX, RGB and HSL values.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0090: Compares two documents line by line and displays additions, deletions, and identical items.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0096: Convert SMI's SYNC timing to SRT time format and apply a sync offset.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0103: Instantly preview the HTML you write in a sandbox iframe.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0107: Edit the HTML and run it.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0111: The entire file is read by the browser and the SHA checksum is calculated.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0112: Select the file whose checksum you want to calculate
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0116: Reduce JPG·PNG·WebP files to Canvas and create downloadable images and data URLs.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0118: Files are never transferred outside the browser.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0127: The sentences you type are read using the voice installed in your browser.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0135: Convert microphone speech to real-time text in supported browsers.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0142: Reads the main headers and text body of local EML files.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0144: Subject, sender, recipient, date and body
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0147: Clicking the area below and pressing a key will display the key, code and modifier status.
tools.file-media-toolbox.text.0149: Click on this area and press the key.

Hello SolForge

Edit the HTML and run it.

tools.gaming-calculators.meta.descriptio: Static calculation of sensitivity conversion, FOV, TTK, crosshair, gamertag, Minecraft One, aspect ratio, PPI, screen size, download time, RAID, RAM latency.
tools.gaming-calculators.meta.title: Game and Hardware Calculators - SolForge
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0008: It is a static tool that calculates results based solely on input values.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0020: Quickly calculate game settings and hardware values.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0021: Frequently calculated values such as sensitivity, field of view, kill time, screen density, storage configuration, and memory latency are gathered in one place.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0071: Calculate the new game sensitivity so that the eDPI is the same even if you change the mouse DPI.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0077: Convert horizontal FOV and vertical FOV based on aspect ratio.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0084: The time it takes to kill is estimated based on health, damage, and fire rate.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0091: You can draw a simple aiming point on Canvas and save it as PNG.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0099: Create nicknames and guild names by combining moods, prefixes, and numbers.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0105: Create a top view blueprint of the circle you will be building out of blocks.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0109: Calculates new horizontal or vertical values while maintaining the original proportions.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0115: Calculate pixel density from resolution and diagonal size.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0121: Calculate physical screen size and recommended viewing distance from diagonal size and aspect ratio.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0127: Calculate the estimated download time based on file size and network speed.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0133: Calculate the available capacity for each RAID based on the number of disks and single disk capacity.
tools.gaming-calculators.text.0139: Calculate the actual latency (ns) using the memory clock and CAS Latency.
tools.gaming-lab.meta.description: It is a browser tool that statically runs CPS, right-click CPS, double-click, space bar, scrolling, reaction speed, aim trainer, keyboard test, mouse polling rate, DPI, and screen test.
tools.gaming-lab.meta.title: game·mouse·keyboard test tool - SolForge
tools.gaming-lab.text.0008: Measurements are calculated only within the browser and are not sent to the server.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0020: Test your input devices and gaming feel in one place.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0021: Check click speed, key input, reaction speed, aim, mouse polling rate, DPI calculation, and screen pattern right in the browser without installation.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0072: Calculate the number of clicks and CPS during the time limit.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0079: Measures right-click speed. The default context menu does not open in the test area.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0086: It detects clicks that occur at short intervals and checks for switch flipping or double-clicking habits.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0093: Check wheel direction, cumulative movement amount, and number of events per second.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0095: Roll your mouse wheel over this area.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0098: Estimate Hz from pointermove event intervals while moving the mouse.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0103: Calculates eDPI and 360-degree rotation distance, which are often used to adjust game sensitivity.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0112: Measures the number of times you hit the space bar and the number of inputs per second.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0116: After focusing on the button, press the space bar.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0119: Check the status of pressed keys, codes, and modifiers.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0121: Click on this area and press the key.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0128: Calculate the number of keystrokes and KPM that occurred over a certain period of time.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0134: Wait for the red screen and click when it turns green.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0140: Click on the target that appears during the time limit to check your hit rate and average response.
tools.gaming-lab.text.0146: Check the monitor status using solid color, grid, gradient, and light/dark patterns.

tools.global-stocks.text.0021: Quickly look up major U.S. stocks and check current prices, fluctuation rates, trading volume, and recent price charts on a static page.

tools.input-training.text.0008: All results are calculated within the browser only.
tools.input-training.text.0020: Check your keyboard and mouse feel with a detailed test.
tools.input-training.text.0021: Typing, memory, WASD, auditory response, keyboard lag and mouse movement tests are provided as static pages.
tools.input-training.text.0081: There are no matching input tests.
tools.input-training.text.0084: When you hear a beep sound after startup, click the button.
tools.input-training.text.0090: Remember the sequence of flashing colors and press them in the same order.
tools.input-training.text.0094: Enter the text following the instructions and check your speed and accuracy.
tools.input-training.text.0099: Quickly press the key that appears.
tools.input-training.text.0104: After focusing, press any key repeatedly to measure the number of inputs per second.
tools.input-training.text.0109: Check whether the same key is pressed repeatedly at short intervals.
tools.input-training.text.0114: Press multiple keys simultaneously to see a list of recognized keys.
tools.input-training.text.0115: Press multiple keys at the same time.
tools.input-training.text.0118: When it turns green, press any key.
tools.input-training.text.0124: Press and hold the same key or repeat it quickly to see the interval between events.
tools.input-training.text.0128: Click on the small target to measure your hit rate.
tools.input-training.text.0132: Hold down the button and draw a path to check for breaks.
tools.input-training.text.0136: Hold the mouse still and check for micro-movement events.
tools.input-training.text.0138: Hover your mouse and leave it still.
tools.input-training.text.0141: Estimate pointer movement speed and maximum speed.
tools.input-training.text.0146: Measure the time from the green signal to the click.
tools.input-training.text.0152: Tracks circular movements to display direction of rotation and cumulative angle.
tools.input-training.text.0156: Check button, coordinate, and wheel input at once.

tools.korea-stocks.text.0008: Enter the stock code to check delayed prices and recent trends.
tools.korea-stocks.text.0020: Quickly check the current prices and recent trends of domestic stocks.
tools.korea-stocks.text.0021: Search domestic stocks such as Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix by stock code, and check price trends and recent transaction data right in the browser.

tools.mysql-explain-visual.meta.descript: MySQL EXPLAIN is a static web tool that allows you to paste results to visualize table access order, join flow, whether indexes are used, estimated costs and risk points.
tools.mysql-explain-visual.meta.title: MySQL EXPLAIN Visual - SolForge
tools.mysql-explain-visual.text.0022: See flows and costs together like a visual execution plan in Workbench.
tools.mysql-explain-visual.text.0035: By analyzing the EXPLAIN results, it visually shows the execution order, join relationships, whether indexes are used, and cost-intensive areas.
tools.mysql-query-prettier.attr.placehol: SELECT u.id,u.name,COUNT(o.id) total FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.user_id=u.id WHERE u.status='active' GROUP BY u.id,u.name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20;
tools.mysql-query-prettier.meta.descript: Paste a MySQL query and it's a free static tool that organizes SELECT, JOIN, WHERE, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, CTE, CASE and subqueries with indentation and syntax highlighting.
tools.mysql-query-prettier.meta.title: MySQL Query Prettier - SolForge
tools.mysql-query-prettier.text.0022: As soon as you input, the sorting results are updated in the output area below.
tools.mysql-query-prettier.text.0035: Line breaks, indentation, and grammar highlighting of complex MySQL queries into a reviewable format.
tools.mysql-query-prettier.text.0042: This post is part of Coupang Partners' activities, and a certain amount of commission is received accordingly.
tools.npm-package-info.meta.description: Generate npm package metadata, download statistics, dependencies, CDN URL, and package.json with npm Registry and jsDelivr public API.
tools.npm-package-info.meta.title: npm Package Info Lookup - SolForge
tools.npm-package-info.text.0008: Call npm Registry and jsDelivr API only when needed.
tools.npm-package-info.text.0020: Check npm package installation, dependency, and CDN information at once.
tools.npm-package-info.text.0021: Searches are subject to debounce and cancellation processing, and detailed information is only requested when selecting or viewing a package. Do not enter sensitive keys or internal package names.
tools.npm-package-info.text.0031: After entering at least 2 characters, up to 10 results will be displayed.
tools.npm-package-info.text.0043: You can select a package from the search results or open it with URL query `?package=react` format.
tools.npm-package-info.text.0055: The failed section is left blank and the remaining information is displayed.
tools.npm-package-info.text.0073: Save up to 3 packages to compare versions, licenses, downloads and dependencies.
tools.npm-package-info.text.0092: This tool queries external public APIs and does not store any input.
tools.npm-package-info.text.0093: © 2026 SolForge. npm data from public npm and jsDelivr APIs.
tools.performance-lab.meta.description: Run CPU, GPU, RAM, bandwidth, mouse DPI ground truth, burn-in patterns, resolution, and WebRTC candidate verification with static browser tools.
tools.performance-lab.meta.title: Performance, Network, and Resolution Diagnostics - SolForge
tools.performance-lab.text.0008: Load tests are limited to a few seconds and run only within the browser.
tools.performance-lab.text.0020: Lightly check the performance and connection environment.
tools.performance-lab.text.0021: Check CPU calculation amount, Canvas rendering, memory allocation, network time calculation, screen resolution, and WebRTC candidates in your browser.
tools.performance-lab.text.0058: There are no matching performance tools.
tools.performance-lab.text.0061: Run a short computation loop to estimate the number of operations per second.
tools.performance-lab.text.0065: Estimate Canvas rendering FPS by drawing moving particles.
tools.performance-lab.text.0069: Allocates a selected size of memory and performs a simple write/verify.
tools.performance-lab.text.0074: Calculate what you need: file size, transfer time, and speed.
tools.performance-lab.text.0080: DPI is estimated by the amount of browser pixel movement when the mouse moves the actual distance.
tools.performance-lab.text.0084: Press Start Measurement and then move horizontally the specified distance.
tools.performance-lab.text.0087: A strong color circular pattern. Do not leave it on for a long time and check it briefly.
tools.performance-lab.text.0091: Displays current browser and screen information.
tools.performance-lab.text.0095: Only checks local ICE candidates exposed by the browser, without an external STUN server.
tools.utility-toolbox.meta.description: A collection of free tools that handle character count, text organization, Hanyoungta, JSON, Base64, URL, Timestamp, UUID, chmod, password, units and BMI in the browser.
tools.utility-toolbox.meta.title: Text, Developer, and Life Tools - SolForge
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0008: Entered text and files are processed only within the browser.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0020: Choose frequently used tools from one place.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0021: Run text, data, developer, and everyday calculation tools without sending data to a server. When you choose a tool, only the inputs you need are shown.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0074: Conversion of roots, interests, and money
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0084: Calculate the number of characters including and excluding spaces, as well as words, lines, and UTF-8 bytes in real time.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0089: Trims consecutive spaces, end-of-line spaces, blank lines, and invisible characters.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0097: The string entered after missing the Korean/English conversion is restored based on the two-set keyboard.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0106: Automatically masks phone numbers, emails, resident registration numbers, and card number patterns.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0112: Applies thousand commas and decimal places to numbers on multiple lines.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0120: Converts integer amounts to Korean won notation and Korean amounts to numbers.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0125: Validate JSON and convert it to indented or single-line format.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0132: Convert UTF-8 text and local files to Base64 or restore them to files.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0146: You can choose to encode the entire URI or per query value.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0152: Decomposes a URL into its protocol, host, path, query, and hash.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0157: Convert between seconds and milliseconds timestamps and local dates.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0163: Generates the UUID from a cryptographically random number in the browser.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0171: Converts numeric permissions like 755 to rwxr-xr-x character permissions.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0176: Creates a copyable password using your browser's cryptographically random numbers.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0187: Convert length, weight, temperature, area and speed.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0194: Determine the root weight yourself and convert it to g and kg.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0204: Calculate your BMI from your height and weight, and your WHR from your waist and hip circumference.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0211: It is not a medical tool to diagnose a medical condition and is for general reference purposes only.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0214: Generates 6 non-duplicate numbers from 1 to 45 as cryptographically random numbers.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0219: All calculations are performed in the current browser.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0220: Input values, including passwords and personal information, are not transmitted to SolForge servers. When making important security, health, and financial decisions, check the latest standards from professional organizations.
tools.utility-toolbox.text.0221: © 2026 SolForge. Static tools in your browser.
tools.world-holidays.meta.description: View country-specific holiday calendars, country comparisons, business day calculations and annual leave bridge recommendations with the Nager.Date public API.
tools.world-holidays.meta.title: World Holiday Calendar - SolForge
tools.world-holidays.text.0008: Call the Nager.Date public API only when necessary.
tools.world-holidays.text.0020: Check the calendar and table for public holidays by country.
tools.world-holidays.text.0021: Select a country, year, and month and your browser will organize a monthly calendar, annual public holidays, remaining public holidays, business day calculations, and annual leave bridge recommendations in your browser.
tools.world-holidays.text.0054: Saturdays and Sundays are distinguished, and public holidays are indicated with badges.
tools.world-holidays.text.0057: Select a date or list on the calendar to see details.
tools.world-holidays.text.0066: Compare public holidays from up to two countries in the same year grouped by date.
tools.world-holidays.text.0086: Annual leave is recommended on Monday for Tuesday holidays, and Friday for Thursday holidays.
tools.world-holidays.text.0089: This tool queries external public APIs and does not store any input.
